name: RIT: Automation Phase
blurb: Designing and building an automated test bench for rocket motor static fire — sensors, data logging, and remote ignition, all built in-house.

name: SAST Oreinthon
blurb: A 24-hour hackathon hosted by SAST, bringing together students to tackle aerospace and tech challenges under one roof. Taking place mid-September.

name: ISRO BAH
blurb: Participating in ISRO's Bharatiya Antariksha Hackathon — developing a space-tech solution addressing a real agency-issued problem statement.

name: NASA Space Apps Challenge
blurb: Building a data-driven solution for NASA's global hackathon, tackling an open challenge spanning Earth observation, space science, or exploration.
